title: Ticket 05 - TOMs & security process
description: Dummy data for ticket 05 - TOMs & security process (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In ticket 05 the key statement appears: "Classify and apply training-company TOM security process safely in daily work." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand the training-company TOM security process in daily work and implement it cleanly.
options.explanation: This summarizes the core idea of the training-company TOM security process in a direct, practical way.

options.text: We can ignore the training-company TOM security process as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: The training-company TOM security process should not be postponed or ignored.

options.text: Only the team lead is allowed to deal with the training-company TOM security process.
options.explanation: This makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning idea.

options.text: The training-company TOM security process only becomes relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning idea should be applied during ongoing daily work.

questions.prompt: Which reaction best fits ticket 05 regarding the training-company TOM security process?

options.text: Align briefly, document cleanly, and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency, and actionable implementation.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by feel.
options.explanation: For the training-company TOM security process this would be imprecise and risky.

options.text: Only raise problems once they are fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right direction is to clarify early instead of escalating late.

options.text: Avoid questions even if the goal is still unclear.
options.explanation: The learning idea requires clarity, not silent guessing.
